_comment: Copy to allowlist.json (gitignored) and put your real users here. The OWNER_ID from .env is ALWAYS allowed and is never listed. Easiest is to manage entries from Telegram (owner only): /allow, /deny, /level, /expire, /limit, /users. Format v2: 'entries' is keyed by numeric Telegram id; 'pending_usernames' holds @username grants not yet seen (auto-pinned to the id on the user's first message). Per user: level 'chat' (chat mode only) or 'code' (chat + code); expires_at = null or 'YYYY-MM-DD'; token_grant = null (unlimited) or an integer cap. A legacy {"ids":[...],"usernames":[...]} file is still read and upgraded automatically.
